aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Nedis Zigbee 2-Gang Dimmer (ZBWD20RD / TS110E)**  
   - **Issue #1359**: Request for support.  
   - **Existing Fingerprint**: `_TZ3210_mt5xjoy6` (dimmer_wall_1gang)  
   - [View Issue](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1359)

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp**  
  - Drivers: `switch_3gang`  
  - [Issue #170](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/170)

- **_TZ3000_l9brjwau**  
  - Drivers: `switch_2gang`  
  - [Issue #1337](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1337)

- **_TZ3000_qkixdnon**  
  - Drivers: `switch_3gang`, `switch_4gang`  
  - [Issue #1338](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1338)

- **_TZ3000_xabckq1v**  
  - Drivers: `button_wireless_4`, `scene_switch_4`, `wall_remote_4_gang_2`  
  - [Issue #1356](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1356)

- **_TZ3000_wkai4ga5**  
  - Drivers: `button_wireless_4`, `scene_switch_4`, `wall_remote_4_gang_3`  
  - [Issue #1356](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1356)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks identified in the current analysis.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **PR #180**: Fix presence_sensor_radar pairing for DP-only TS0601 devices  
   - **User**: Robsta86  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE204_sxm7l9xa`, `_TZE204_qasjif9e`  
   - [View PR](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/180)

2. **PR #1350**: Added TS110E driver  
   - **User**: PiTRiS87  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`  
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)

3. **PR #1166**: Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202  
   - **User**: chernals  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`  
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)

4. **PR #1253**: Added 3 new devices  
   - **User**: Peter-Celica  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`  
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)

5. **PR #1219**: Update driver.compose.json  
   - **User**: Melectro1  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`  
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)

6. **PR #1218**: Update driver.compose.json  
   - **User**: Melectro1  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE204_dapwryy7`  
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)

7. **PR #1195**: Add `_TZE204_bjzrowv2` - Update app.json  
   - **User**: YuriEstevan  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`  
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)

---

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub repository, focusing on device requests, existing fingerprints, and notable pull requests. For further details, please refer to the linked issues and pull requests.
